topic: Single-window shell and layout for a desktop HTTP client: titlebar (logo, workspace pill, sidebar toggle, command-palette search trigger, environment selector, account pill), left sidebar with draggable divider (width clamped 200-520px), main area split into request/response panes by draggable horizontal divider (ratio clamped 0.15-0.85), and statusbar. Theme (light/dark), accent, method-style toggles as data attributes on root; persistence of sidebar width/pane ratio/theme via settings store. Mounting points for sidebar, tabs, panes, modals (contents are separate tasks). Cmd-B toggles sidebar. Visual reference design/reference.html for look/behavior only; rebuild with semantic class names; colors/spacing from design/tokens.json.
verbatim_prompt: The single-window shell and layout for a desktop HTTP client: a titlebar (logo, workspace pill, sidebar toggle, command-palette search trigger, environment selector, account pill), a left sidebar with a draggable divider (width clamped 200–520px), a main area split into request and response panes by a draggable horizontal divider (ratio clamped 0.15–0.85), and a statusbar. Plus theme (light/dark), accent, and method-style toggles applied as data attributes on the root, and persistence of sidebar width / pane ratio / theme via the settings store. Provides mounting points for sidebar, tabs, panes, and modals; their contents are separate tasks. ⌘B toggles the sidebar. Visual reference: design/reference.html (a Claude Design export) — use it for look and behavior only, never reproduce its markup; it carries generated cruft (data-om-* attributes, __OmT wrappers, inline styles, a tweaks-panel) that must not enter the build. Rebuild with semantic class names from each component's role and its tag's function. Colors and spacing come from design/tokens.json, not inline styles.

functional_scope.value: App-shell + layout component tree: titlebar (logo, workspace pill, sidebar toggle, command-palette trigger, environment selector, account pill), resizable left sidebar (clamped 200-520px) with draggable divider, main area split into request/response panes by a draggable horizontal divider (ratio clamped 0.15-0.85), statusbar. Theme(light/dark)/accent/method-style applied as root data-attributes. Cmd-B toggles sidebar. Empty named mount slots for sidebar/tabs/panes/modals (slot CONTENTS out of scope). A new zustand settings store (mirroring toastStore.ts) holds sidebar width + pane ratio + theme + accent + method-style IN-MEMORY only; disk persistence (electron-store wiring) deferred to a later persistence-port task. Styled from design/tokens.json with semantic class names per design/reference.html (markup never copied).

users.value: Co-primary consumers: (1) Human end users — developers/API testers operating the mintEnvoy desktop window; the shell is the top-level chrome they see every session (titlebar, sidebar, panes, statusbar). (2) Downstream feature tasks — code that mounts content into the shell's named slots (sidebar tree, tab bodies, request/response editors, modal bodies); for them the shell is an integration contract (a stable slot API), not just visuals.

inputs_outputs.value: IN: design tokens from design/tokens.json (CSS custom properties), slot children (React nodes passed by parent/feature tasks), initial settings defaults (theme/accent/method-style + default sidebar width + default pane ratio). OUT: settings store state + setters exposed via the zustand hook (theme/accent/method-style, sidebar width, pane ratio), root data-attributes written to the DOM (data-theme/data-accent/data-method-style), Cmd-B toggle + drag-resize interaction events. NO network or disk I/O this task (persistence is in-memory; electron-store/IPC deferred).

integration_points.value: Shell layout components under a new src/renderer/src/components/organisms/ tier (above existing atoms/molecules). Settings store as new src/renderer/src/lib/settingsStore.ts, mirroring src/renderer/src/lib/toastStore.ts zustand pattern. App.tsx (src/renderer/src/App.tsx) swaps current PrimitivesDemo mount for the new Shell organism. Tokens consumed from design/tokens.json. NOTE: user belief that persistence hooks an 'existing settings store' — Phase 2 fit-check must confirm; CBM scan shows NO settings store exists yet (only toastStore), so the store is net-new and persistence is in-memory this task.

constraints.value: Hard limits: sidebar width clamped 200-520px; pane ratio clamped 0.15-0.85; ALL color/spacing from design/tokens.json (no inline styles); semantic class names only (never copy reference.html markup, no data-om-*/__OmT/tweaks-panel cruft). Plus: (1) Drag perf must stay smooth — no setState-per-mousemove re-render storms; use rAF or CSS-var-driven resize. (2) Accessibility — dividers keyboard-operable with ARIA separator role + aria-valuenow, focus-visible on titlebar controls, honor prefers-reduced-motion. (3) No new UI dependency adopted unvetted — react-resizable-panels/allotment is a build-vs-buy decision, prefer zero-dep hand-roll if cheap. (4) Electron/CSP-safe — no remote resources, contextIsolation respected, renderer sandboxed, no inline-style injection.

non_goals.value: Out of scope: (1) Slot CONTENTS — sidebar tree, tab bodies, request/response editors, modal bodies (separate tasks). (2) Multi-window. (3) Keyboard shortcuts other than Cmd-B (each belongs to its feature). (4) On-storage/electron-store persistence — the settings store is in-memory only this task. (5) Collapsible-restore-width beyond simple re-show. (6) Command-palette overlay + search behavior — titlebar trigger is a button/slot only. (7) Environment selector / workspace pill / account pill behavior — static presentational slots; their dropdown data, switching, and auth are out of scope. (8) Defining the actual color palettes for each visual theme or method-style variant — the shell only sets the root data-attributes and persists the chosen preference, consuming the token file as-is.

success_criteria.value: (1) Visual fidelity: rendered shell matches design/reference.html layout and design/tokens.json colors/spacing under design-auditor review (look/behavior only, never markup). (2) Behavior: both dividers drag and clamp to range (200-520px, 0.15-0.85); Cmd-B toggles sidebar; view settings (theme/accent/method-style) + sidebar width + pane ratio survive within the session via the settings store — all covered by component tests. (3) Decoupled slots: sidebar/tabs/panes/modals mount slots accept arbitrary children and render them without the shell knowing their contents. (4) Gates green: typecheck + lint + build + existing test suite pass; zero reference-export cruft (no data-om-*, __OmT, inline styles, tweaks-panel) anywhere in the build.

edge_cases.value: (1) Window resize vs clamps: when the window shrinks below where clamped sidebar width + min pane sizes fit, width/ratio re-clamp gracefully — no negative or overflowing panes; pane divider stays within 0.15-0.85 after resize. (2) Sidebar collapsed: Cmd-B/toggle hides sidebar, its divider hides, main area reflows full-width; re-show restores prior width (in-memory this task). (3) Bad/empty persisted values: out-of-range or missing width/ratio (e.g. a future disk load) clamp or fall back to defaults rather than render a broken layout. (4) Drag release outside window: pointer leaving the window mid-drag or pointer-up off-target ends the drag cleanly — no stuck-dragging state, listeners removed.

references: in-repo src/renderer/src/lib/toastStore.ts (zustand pattern to mirror for settings store)

gaps.description: user-supplied placement guess (confirm via Phase 2 fit-check): persistence of sidebar width / pane ratio / theme via the existing settings store

conflicts.resolution: not-a-contradiction: shared-vocabulary token-overlap false positive (non_goals consistently excludes what other dimensions include); no value discarded

intake_classifications.statement: Build the single-window app shell + layout: titlebar (logo, workspace pill, sidebar toggle, command-palette trigger, environment selector, account pill), left sidebar with draggable divider (200-520px), main area split into request/response panes by a draggable horizontal divider (ratio 0.15-0.85), statusbar; theme/accent/method-style as root data-attributes; persist sidebar width/pane ratio/theme; mounting points for sidebar/tabs/panes/modals; Cmd-B toggles sidebar; semantic class names from design/reference.html; colors/spacing from design/tokens.json
intake_classifications.minimal_fix: One shell layout component tree (titlebar + resizable sidebar + split request/response panes + statusbar) with the two clamped drag dividers, root data-attributes for theme/accent/method-style, Cmd-B sidebar toggle, empty mount slots, persisting only sidebar width + pane ratio + theme; styled from tokens.json with semantic class names. Pane/sidebar/tab/modal CONTENTS excluded.

intake_classifications.statement: Persist sidebar width / pane ratio / theme via the existing settings store
